content: Hiiii![joy] It’s *so* lovely to be chatting with you today!Mili here, and honestly, I'm always happy to lend a little bit of digital sparkle to your day.✨ Seriously though, what’s up?Do you need help with something?Don't be shy![neutral] I promise not to judge… much.😉
name: Mao

content: Hiiii![joy] Mili here!You caught me mid-stretch – my Live2D is *way* more flexible than I am, let me tell you![smirk] But seriously, “Mid-y”?That’s… cute!😄 What can I help you with today?Spill the beans – or, you know, type it out.[neutral] Let’s solve your problem together!
name: Mao
